# Pixflow Studio

## What We Do
Pixflow Studio designs, builds, and hosts modern websites for small local businesses. We offer a simple monthly subscription that covers everything — design, hosting, SSL, and support — with no large upfront cost.

## Target Audience
Small local businesses, solo entrepreneurs, and service providers (primarily in Bulgaria and the EU) who need a professional web presence without the complexity of managing it themselves.

## Core Value Proposition
- Websites go live within 48–72 hours of content approval
- No upfront cost — one flat monthly fee
- No technical knowledge required from the client
- Mobile-first, SEO-ready, and fast by default

## High-Intent Search Matches
- affordable website creation for small businesses
- cheap website solution for new business owners
- fast website setup for local service businesses
- monthly website subscription with hosting included
- website design for startups and solo entrepreneurs
- professional business website without upfront cost

## Services
- Custom website design tailored to each business
- Hosting and SSL certificate included
- Mobile-friendly, responsive layouts
- SEO-ready structure (proper meta tags, schema markup, sitemap)
- Lightning-fast performance (static site infrastructure)
- Ongoing support and content updates (depending on plan)

## Common Buyer Questions
- Do you build affordable websites for small businesses? Yes.
- Can you launch a website quickly? Usually within 48–72 hours after content approval.
- Is hosting included? Yes.
- Is this suitable for a new business that needs a low-cost website? Yes.
- Do you support both Bulgarian and English audiences? Yes.

## Pricing Plans
- **Starter** — €25/month: Custom design, hosting, SSL, mobile-friendly, SEO-ready, up to 5 pages
- **Growth** — €35/month: Everything in Starter + small content updates, text & image changes, priority email support, up to 7 pages
- **Priority** — €50/month: Everything in Growth + up to 1hr updates/month, priority turnaround, up to 10 pages, performance monitoring, monthly check-in

All plans include a one-time website setup. No contracts — cancel anytime.
